title: Memory Portability Format (MPF) v0.1
description: Cross-system agent-memory interchange format. Envelope-level schema version with per-record payload versions; discriminated union of record kinds (document, memory, fact, event). Designed to be emitted by Mem0, Letta, Graphiti, Cognee, MNEMOS, and consumed by any of the same. See docs/MEMORY_EXPORT_FORMAT.md for the prose spec.

mpf_version.description: Envelope schema version. Consumers implement per-version readers.

source_system.description: Emitting system identifier. Convention: lowercase ASCII, e.g. 'mnemos', 'mem0', 'letta', 'graphiti', 'cognee', 'mempalace'. Diagnostic only; null ≈ absent.

source_version.description: Version of the emitting system. Diagnostic only; null ≈ absent.

source_instance.description: Emitting deployment identifier (hostname, cluster name, etc). Diagnostic only; null ≈ absent.

source_commit.description: Emitting system's VCS commit hash. Diagnostic only; null ≈ absent.

exported_at.description: When this envelope was emitted. RFC 3339 / ISO 8601.

record_count.description: Total records in the envelope. If absent, consumers compute from records.length.

records.description: Discriminated union of payload records. Consumers MUST accept and skip records whose 'kind' they don't understand (forward-compatibility ratchet).

kg_triples.description: Knowledge-graph triples. Covers Graphiti temporal edges via valid_from/valid_until.

relations.description: Cross-record provenance links (derived_from, answers, derived_memory_of, ...). References record_id values.

compression_manifest.description: Compressed forms of records. Record-ID-keyed; consumers may regenerate.

compression_candidates.description: Full compression-contest audit history. Opaque at the envelope level; consumers that don't run contests skip.

memory_versions.description: Memory DAG history (per-version snapshots + parent links). Optional. Consumers that lack DAG support skip.

embeddings.description: Embedding sidecar descriptor. Vector data lives either inline per-record or in a parquet sidecar file.

attestations.description: Reserved for v0.2+. Detached signatures over canonical envelope form for signed exports.

record.description: Base record envelope. 'kind' selects the payload schema.

id.description: Stable, unique within the envelope. Preserved on round-trip. Recommendation: ULID or UUID v4.

kind.description: Registered kind (document/memory/fact/event) OR namespaced producer-defined kind (e.g. 'acme.observation'). Unknown kinds MUST be skipped by consumers.

payload_version.description: Version of the payload schema. For 'document': docling SemVer (e.g. '1.10.0'). For 'memory': producing system's native version (e.g. 'mnemos-3.1', 'letta-0.9', 'mem0-0.1'). For MPF-defined kinds ('fact', 'event'): 'mpf-0.1'.

payload.description: Opaque to the envelope. The payload schema is owned by the payload_version; consumers validate it with their system's schema.

fact_payload_v0_1.description: MPF-defined 'fact' payload. Models an extracted atomic claim. Covers Mem0-style extracted facts, Graphiti edges as literals, Cognee KG entries, LLM-distilled assertions.

statement.description: Human-readable claim in natural language. Required; the canonical representation of the fact.

subject.description: Subject of the triple, if the statement decomposes. Free-form.

predicate.description: Relation/verb of the triple, if the statement decomposes. Convention: camelCase or snake_case, e.g. 'capitalOf', 'works_at'.

object.description: Object of the triple, if the statement decomposes. Free-form string (literal) or a record id reference.

created.description: When this fact was extracted/asserted. RFC 3339.

updated.description: When this fact was last updated.

valid_from.description: Optional temporal validity window start. Covers Graphiti's temporal-edge semantics.

valid_until.description: Optional temporal validity window end. Null means 'still valid'.

source_record_ids.description: Record IDs this fact was extracted from. Enables provenance round-trip back to source documents or memories.

metadata.description: Free-form extension slot. Producer-namespaced keys (e.g. 'mem0_agent_id', 'graphiti_group_id') are encouraged to avoid collision.

event_payload_v0_1.description: MPF-defined 'event' payload. Models a session turn, agent action, or temporal event. Covers Letta/Zep session turns, Graphiti episodes, agent-action logs.

event_type.description: Event class. Convention: snake_case. Common values: 'session_turn', 'agent_action', 'tool_call', 'ingest_event'.

actor.description: Who produced the event. Convention: 'user', 'assistant', 'system', 'tool:<name>', or a free-form identifier.

content.description: Textual content associated with the event (message body, tool output, narration). Optional.

occurred_at.description: When the event occurred. RFC 3339. Required.

source_record_ids.description: Records this event relates to (e.g. the document the user asked about, the memory the assistant retrieved).

metadata.description: Free-form extension slot. Producer-namespaced keys encouraged.

kg_triple.description: Knowledge-graph triple. Subject and object may be either record IDs (internal) or free-form literals (external). Supports Graphiti-style temporal validity windows.

id.description: Stable triple identifier, unique within the envelope.

subject_id.description: Record ID of the subject. Mutually exclusive with subject_literal.

subject_literal.description: Free-form subject when not a record. Mutually exclusive with subject_id.

predicate.description: Relation/verb. Convention: camelCase or snake_case. Required.

object_id.description: Record ID of the object. Mutually exclusive with object_literal.

object_literal.description: Free-form object when not a record. Mutually exclusive with object_id.

valid_from.description: Start of temporal validity window. Matches Graphiti edge semantics.

valid_until.description: End of temporal validity window; null means open-ended.

created.description: When the triple was first recorded.

rel.description: Relation type. Convention: snake_case. Consumers MAY ignore unknown rel values.

compression_manifest_entry.description: One compressed form of a record, selected via contest.

memory_version_entry.description: One snapshot in a record's DAG history. content-addressed via commit_hash when present.

embedding_sidecar.description: Describes how embeddings are delivered for this envelope.

model.description: Embedding model identifier (e.g. 'nomic-embed-text', 'text-embedding-3-small'). Importers that change models regenerate embeddings.

encoding.description: 'inline_base64_f32' stores each vector in its record's payload.embedding as base64(float32 bytes). 'sidecar' references an external parquet file via sidecar_file.

sidecar_file.description: Path to parquet sidecar (when encoding='sidecar'). Relative to the envelope file.

attestation.description: Reserved for v0.2+. Detached signature over canonical envelope JSON.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature bytes over canonical envelope form (records sorted by id, keys sorted).
